name: Autopilot Branding
description: A PowerShell-based customization tool packaged as an Intune Win32 app for configuring Windows 10/11 devices during Autopilot deployment. Customizes start menu layout, background/theme, time zone, removes built-in apps, installs OneDrive, configures language packs, and manages Windows features.
keywords: deploy custom start menu layout intune
author: Michael Niehaus
